name: Goa
description: Sun-drenched beaches, Portuguese heritage, and laid-back coastal vibes make Goa India's favorite beach getaway.
popularFor: Beaches, nightlife, water sports, Portuguese architecture
attractions: Baga Beach, Anjuna Flea Market, Old Goa Churches, Dudhsagar Falls

name: Manali
description: Snow-capped Himalayan town perfect for adventure seekers and honeymooners alike, surrounded by pine forests and the Beas River.
bestTimeToVisit: March to June and December to February
popularFor: Snow activities, trekking, paragliding, river rafting
attractions: Solang Valley, Rohtang Pass, Hadimba Temple, Old Manali

name: Mumbai
description: India's financial capital that never sleeps, blending colonial heritage with Bollywood glamour and street food culture.
popularFor: Business, nightlife, street food, Bollywood, beaches
attractions: Gateway of India, Marine Drive, Elephanta Caves, Bandra-Worli Sea Link

name: Jaipur
description: The Pink City of Rajasthan, famous for its royal palaces, vibrant bazaars, and rich Rajput heritage.
popularFor: Palaces, forts, heritage, shopping, Rajasthani cuisine
attractions: Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar, Nahargarh Fort

name: Alleppey
description: The Venice of the East, known for its serene backwaters, houseboats, and palm-fringed canals.
attractions: Alleppey Beach, Vembanad Lake, Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary, Marari Beach

name: Shimla
description: Queen of the Hills, a colonial summer capital surrounded by pine forests with snowfall in winter and the iconic toy train.
bestTimeToVisit: March to June and December to February
popularFor: Snowfall, colonial architecture, hill station, toy train
attractions: The Mall Road, Ridge, Jakhu Temple, Christ Church, Kufri

name: Udaipur
description: The City of Lakes, a romantic destination with stunning palaces reflected in tranquil waters and rich Mewar heritage.
attractions: Lake Pichola, City Palace, Jag Mandir, Sajjangarh Palace, Saheliyon ki Bari

name: Darjeeling
description: Famous tea gardens, the Himalayan toy train, and breathtaking views of Mount Kanchenjunga.
bestTimeToVisit: March to May and September to November
popularFor: Tea gardens, mountain views, toy train, monasteries
attractions: Tiger Hill, Batasia Loop, Darjeeling Himalayan Railway, Happy Valley Tea Estate
